notes: Added Goodbye by Air Supply to the existing songs dataset using the current section-system-measure chart shape.
Captured source uncertainty in summary and chart notes because the user-provided E-Chords page was blocked by a Cloudflare challenge during ingestion.
Structured the chart around the visible verse, pre-chorus, chorus, modulation, and final coda lifts so the existing viewer can render it without UI changes.
open_issues: This is still a manual seed rather than a formal published lead-sheet import.
Exact lyric-level beat placement may differ from the blocked source page because the chart was digitized from an accessible mirrored transcription.
